Klasse ImaginativePlayer

java.lang.Object
players.PlayerEntity
players.ImaginativePlayer
public class ImaginativePlayer extends PlayerEntity
ImaginativePlayer is a subclass of PlayerEntity that represents a player capable of planning moves based on the rules of the game without performing them. It can generate all possible moves and removals for itself and its opponent.

  • Felddetails

    • ruleManager

      private final RuleManager ruleManager

    • player

      private final PlayerEntity player

  • Konstruktordetails

    • ImaginativePlayer

      public ImaginativePlayer(PlayerEntity playerSelf)
      Constructs an ImaginativePlayer with the given PlayerEntity. This constructor is used to create a player that can simulate moves without actually executing them in the game.
      Parameter:
      playerSelf - The PlayerEntity to base this ImaginativePlayer on.

  • Methodendetails

    • getAllPossibleMoves

      public List<Node[]> getAllPossibleMoves()
      Returns a list of all possible moves for this player. This method generates moves based on the current phase of the game.
      Gibt zurück:
      A list of Node arrays representing all possible moves.
      Siehe auch:
      • settingPhaseMoves()
      • movingPhaseMoves()
      • jumpingPhaseMoves()

    • settingPhaseMoves

      private List<Node[]> settingPhaseMoves()
      Helper method for the getAllPossibleMoves() method.

      Returns a list of all possible moves for the setting phase.

      Gibt zurück:
      A list of Node arrays representing all possible moves in the setting phase.

    • movingPhaseMoves

      private List<Node[]> movingPhaseMoves()
      Helper method for the getAllPossibleMoves() method.

      Returns a list of all possible moves for the moving phase.

      Gibt zurück:
      A list of Node arrays representing all possible moves in the moving phase.

    • jumpingPhaseMoves

      private List<Node[]> jumpingPhaseMoves()
      Helper method for the getAllPossibleMoves() method.

      Returns a list of all possible moves for the jumping phase.

      Gibt zurück:
      A list of Node arrays representing all possible moves in the jumping phase.

    • getAllPossibleRemovals

      public List<Node> getAllPossibleRemovals(PlayerEntity opponent)
      Returns a list of all possible removals for the opponent. This method checks which stones can be removed based on the current game state.
      Parameter:
      opponent - The PlayerEntity representing the opponent.
      Gibt zurück:
      A list of Node objects representing all possible removals.
